mapper.select: /* IOE장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.upload_timestamp, b.upload_date, b.device_stat, b.device_ioe_idx from ( select device.device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device.device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device.device_type, device.inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' when 9 then 'AMI' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_ioe_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_reg_id, serial_no, inst_type, inst_purpose, data_period, data_cnt, ct_capacity, ct_capacity_list, pw_capacity, ch_cnt, ch_purpose, provider, vr_device_id, vr_device_grp_id, vr_owner_id, vr_action, vr_stat, vr_mod_date, vr_error, tm_voltage, tm_pulse, tm_ct_ratio, tm_pt_tatio, network_conf, options, create_timestamp, create_date, upload_timestamp, upload_date, device_stat, reg_date from tb_device_ioe where (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_ioe group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* PCS장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_pcs_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.alarm_msg, b.ac_voltage, b.ac_power, b.ac_current, b.ac_freq, b.ac_set_power, b.ac_pf, b.dc_voltage, b.dc_power, b.dc_current, b.dc_freq, b.dc_set_power, b.dc_pf, b.pcs_status, b.pcs_status_nm, b.pcs_command, b.pcs_command_nm, b.today_c_energy, b.today_d_energy from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' when 9 then 'AMI' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_pcs_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, ac_voltage, ac_power, ac_current, ac_freq, ac_set_power, ac_pf, dc_voltage, dc_power, dc_current, dc_freq, dc_set_power, dc_pf, std_date, reg_date , pcs_status, remote_mode, pcs_command, today_d_energy, today_c_energy, total_d_energy, total_c_energe , case pcs_status when 0 then 'OFF' when 1 then 'ON' when 2 then 'Fault' when 3 then 'Warning' else '' end as pcs_status_nm , case pcs_command when 0 then 'Stop' when 1 then 'Run' else '' end as pcs_command_nm from tb_device_pcs where (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pcs group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* BMS장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_bms_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.device_stat_nm, b.sys_soc, b.curr_soc, b.sys_soh, b.sys_soh, b.sys_voltage, b.sys_current, b.dod from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' when 9 then 'AMI' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_bms_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, sys_soc, curr_soc, sys_soh, sys_voltage, sys_current, dod, std_date, reg_date ,case device_stat when 0 then 'Idle' when 1 then 'Charge' when 2 then 'Discharge' when 3 then 'MainS/W on/off' when 4 then 'Off-line' when 5 then 'Ready' when 6 then 'Fault' when 7 then 'Warning' else '' end as device_stat_nm from tb_device_bms where (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_bms group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* PV장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm , b.device_pv_idx, b.std_date, b.device_stat, b.device_stat_nm, b.alarm_msg, b.temp, b.tot_power from ( select device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device_type, inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' when 9 then 'AMI' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_pv_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, temp, tot_power, std_date, reg_date , case device_stat when 0 then 'Stop' when 1 then 'Run' when 2 then 'Fault' when 3 then 'Warning' else '' end as device_stat_nm from tb_device_pv where (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_pv group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

/* AMI장치 상세 조회 */ select a.device_id, a.site_id, a.device_name, site.site_name, a.device_grp_name, a.device_type, concat('(', a.inst_type_nm, ')', a.device_type_nm) as device_type_nm, b.device_stat, b.voltage_r, b.voltage_s, b.voltage_t, b.current_r, b.current_s, b.current_t, b.frequency, b.accum_active_power_r, b.accum_active_power_s, b.accum_active_power_t, b.accum_reactive_power_lagging_r, b.accum_reactive_power_lagging_s, b.accum_reactive_power_lagging_t, b.accum_reactive_power_leading_r, b.accum_reactive_power_leading_s, b.accum_reactive_power_leading_t, b.device_ami_idx from ( select device.device_id, device.site_id, device.user_idx, device.device_name, device.device_grp_idx, device.device_type, device.inst_type, case device_type when 1 then 'PCS' when 2 then 'BMS' when 3 then 'PV' when 4 then '부하측정기기' when 5 then 'PV모니터링기기' when 6 then 'ESS모니터링기기' when 7 then 'iSmart' when 8 then '총량기기' when 9 then 'AMI' else '' end as device_type_nm , case inst_type when 1 then '에너톡' when 2 then '로컬EMS' else '' end as inst_type_nm , device_grp_name from tb_device device left outer join tb_device_group deviceGroup on device.device_grp_idx = deviceGroup.device_grp_idx ) a left outer join ( select device_ami_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarmMsg, voltage_r, voltage_s, voltage_t, current_r, current_s, current_t, frequency, accum_active_power_r, accum_active_power_s, accum_active_power_t, accum_reactive_power_lagging_r, accum_reactive_power_lagging_s, accum_reactive_power_lagging_t, accum_reactive_power_leading_r, accum_reactive_power_leading_s, accum_reactive_power_leading_t, std_date, reg_date from tb_device_ami where (site_id, device_id, reg_date) in ( select site_id, device_id, max(reg_date) reg_date from tb_device_ami group by site_id, device_id ) ) b on a.site_id = b.site_id and a.device_id = b.device_id , tb_site site where a.site_id = site.site_id and a.site_id = #{siteId } and a.device_id = #{deviceId } and a.device_type = #{deviceType }

select device_type, device_id, case when device_type = 'i' then '인버터' when device_type IN ('V', 'A') then '차단기' when device_type = 's' then '접속반' when device_type = 'W' then '기상반' else '기타장치' end as device_type_name from tb_device where site_id = #{siteId} group by device_type_name order by device_type

select device_type, sum(pv_watt) as inv_dc, sum(daily_pwr) as inv_daily_pwr, sum(tot_power) as inv_tot_power, sum(ac_curr_r) as inv_ac, avg(tot_volt) as sol_tot_volt, avg(tot_amp) as sol_tot_amp, avg(insolation_pv) as sol_insolation_pv, avg(insolation_horz) as sol_insolation_horz, sum(temp_near) as wea_temp_near, sum(wind_speed) as wea_wind_speed, sum(humidity) as wea_humidity, sum(rainfall) as wea_rainfall, sum(wea_Insolation_horz) as wea_Insolation_horz, sum(wea_Insolation_pv) as wea_Insolation_pv, sum(now_pwr) as cir_now_pwr, sum(total_pwr) as cir_total_pwr, avg(hertz) as cir_hertz, sum( case when alarm_act_yn = 'N' then 1 else 0 end) as abnormal_cnt, sum( case when alarm_act_yn IS NULL or alarm_act_yn = 'Y' then 1 else 0 end) as normal_cnt from ( select device.device_id, device.site_id, device.device_name, device.device_type, device.del_yn, inverter.pv_watt, inverter.ac_curr_r, inverter.daily_pwr, inverter.tot_power, solar.tot_volt, solar.tot_amp, solar.insolation_pv, solar.insolation_horz, wea.temp_near, wea.wind_speed, wea.humidity, wea.rainfall, wea.Insolation_horz as wea_Insolation_horz, wea.Insolation_pv as wea_Insolation_pv, circuit.now_pwr, circuit.total_pwr, circuit.hertz, alarm.alarm_type, alarm.alarm_act_yn from tb_device device left outer join ( select t1.* from ( select inverter_id, pv_watt, ac_curr_r, daily_pwr, tot_power, row_number() over(partition by site_id, inverter_id order by update_date desc) as rn from tb_device_inverter where site_id = #{siteId} ) t1 where t1.rn = 1 ) inverter on device.device_id = inverter.inverter_id and device.device_type = 'i' left outer join ( select t1.* from ( select inverter_id, tot_volt, tot_amp, insolation_pv, insolation_horz, row_number() over(partition by site_id, inverter_id order by update_date desc) as rn from solarpanel where site_id = #{siteId} ) t1 where t1.rn = 1 ) solar on device.device_id = solar.inverter_id and device.device_type = 's' left outer join ( select t1.* from ( select device_id, site_id, temp_near, wind_speed, humidity, rainfall, Insolation_horz, Insolation_pv, row_number() over(partition by site_id, device_id order by update_date desc) as rn from weather where site_id = #{siteId} ) t1 where t1.rn = 1 ) wea on device.device_id = wea.device_id and device.device_type = 'W' left outer join ( select t1.* from ( select inverter_id, now_pwr, total_pwr, hertz, row_number() over(partition by site_id, inverter_id order by update_date desc) as rn from circuit_breaker where site_id = #{siteId} ) t1 where t1.rn = 1
) circuit on device.device_id = circuit.inverter_id and device.device_type in('V', 'A') left outer join ( select t1.* from ( select site_id, device_id, device_type, alarm_type, alarm_act_yn, row_number() over(partition by site_id, device_id order by std_date desc) as rn from tb_alarm where site_id = #{siteId} ) t1 where t1.rn =1 ) alarm on device.device_id = alarm.device_id and device.device_type = alarm.device_type where device.site_id= #{siteId} ) A group by device_type

select sum(tot_power) as tot_power, sum(daily_pwr) as daily_pwr, sum(now_pwr) as now_pwr, avg(inv_temp) as inv_temp, avg(inv_humi) as inv_humi from tb_device_inverter where site_id = #{siteId} and DATE_FORMAT(update_date, '%Y%m%d') = DATE_FORMAT(CURRENT_DATE(), '%Y%m%d')
